title: R-0023: Demand case — freelancer with insufficient TDS, self-assessment tax required

expected_output.payment_instruction: Pay self-assessment tax of ₹73,080 under Challan 280 before filing return (Section 140A)

notes: Freelancer: tax ₹80,200 + interest ₹6,440 = ₹86,640 + ₹6,440 wait, total_tax_new_regime already includes cess per R-0020. Total due = ₹86,640 + ₹6,440 interest = ₹93,080. TDS credit from 26AS = ₹20,000. Demand = ₹73,080. Must pay self-assessment tax before filing — Section 140A requires payment before ITR submission.
